name: unison-brain
description: Open-source client for the Unison brain — your cloud knowledge base, in any coding agent.
author: Auraqu, Inc.

scripts.build: bun run --filter '@unison/sdk' build && bun run --filter '@unison/cli' build && bun run --filter '@unison/mcp' build
scripts.release: bun run build && npm publish --workspace @unison/sdk && npm publish --workspace @unison/cli && npm publish --workspace @unison/mcp
